characters.name: Alfred J. McSorely
characters.description: Alfred J. McSorelyBiographical InformationFull nameAlfred J. McSorelyPhysical InformationGenderMaleEye colorBlueHair colorBrownAffiliationsSchoolPootatuck Middle SchoolProductionFirst seenBecome a Millionaire and Give It All Away Thing!Alfred J. McSorelyformerly attendedPootatuck Middle School. His performance at the school earned him an award for most outstanding student in 1982. It is known that Alfred attended Pootatuck in 1982, but it is unknown from what years he was at the school. While there, he earned the Most Outstanding Student award for his school performance. He also earned a millionPootabucks, which he hid on the school's property. Mr. Robertstalks about the rumor that Alfred had accumulated a million Pootabucks during his time at Pootatuck and hid them somewhere on the school's property.FenwickandCrispoare excited at the news and look for clues on Alfred's award. Later,CJand Mr. Roberts join them on the search.

She is portrayed by Vanessa Nicole Howard. Fenwicksays Amy is the prettiest girl in the eighth grade. Amy says she only dates football players. She clearly cares about her appearance, as she has been shown looking in a mirror and primping. Fenwick says that she is materialistic and has a sense of entitlement. He is portrayed by Anthony De La Torre. Anthony is a Latin singer. He has been seen inPop Tigermagazines and was even featured on the cover of the May 2015 issue. He is shy. He also shows gratefulness atMr. Martinfixing his foot and agrees to sing forCJto repay him. He is shy. He also shows gratefulness atMr. Martinfixing his foot and agrees to sing forCJto repay him.

characters.name: Arthur Pickwickle
characters.description: Arthur PickwickleBiographical InformationFull nameArthur PickwicklePhysical InformationGenderMaleHair colorBrownRelationshipsRomancesScout McKluskiAffiliationsOccupationStudentSchoolPootatuck Middle SchoolProductionFirst seenPortrayed bySay Yes to Everything for a Day!Gianni DeCenzoArthur Pickwickleis a student atPootatuck Middle School. He is portrayed byGianni DeCenzo. Arthur has no problems being himself and enjoying things that may seem uncool, like the Stone and Swords Club. He appears to be loyal and willing to help defend a friend, but will remove himself from uncomfortable situations such as whenthe Vortexcornered him and the Sword and Stones club orCJtried to control his life. Arthur first makes his appearance in this episode. He and the other Pootatuck Sword and Stones club members recruitFenwickinto their ranks. Arthur has no problems being himself and enjoying things that may seem uncool, like the Stone and Swords Club. He appears to be loyal and willing to help defend a friend, but will remove himself from uncomfortable situations such as whenthe Vortexcornered him and the Sword and Stones club orCJtried to control his life.

characters.name: Aubrey Garcia
characters.description: Aubrey GarciaBiographical InformationFull nameAubrey GarciaPhysical InformationGenderFemaleEye colorBrownAffiliationsOccupationStudentSchoolPootatuck Middle SchoolAffiliationsBlack Lipstick GirlsProductionFirst seenPortrayed byChange Your Look and See What Happens Thing!Allegra AcostaAubrey Garciais a student atPootatuck Middle School. She is portrayed byAllegra Acosta. Aubrey and the Black Lipstick Girls aren't seen smiling often and because of this, most students perceive them as being mean, which actually does not bother her. She laughs at things that she finds funny and doesn't mind helping others, seen when she shares her lipstick withCJ. Aubrey and the Black Lipstick Girls are first seen moving aside when CJ, Fenwick, and Crispo's walk by. CJ calls their look The Black Lipstick Look. Aubrey and two of the Black Lipstick girls can be seen inMr. Bored's class with CJ, Fenwick, and Crispo. WhenPrincipal Haderwants a student to take some pictures with her, Aubrey and her friends volunteer, but Hader rejects their offer and instead chooses CJ because of her outfit. Later, while Hader and CJ are surveying the hallways to find who vandalized Hader's posters, Aubrey and the girls walk by and show their hall passes when asked. Aubrey and the Black Lipstick Girls aren't seen smiling often and because of this, most students perceive them as being mean, which actually does not bother her. She laughs at things that she finds funny and doesn't mind helping others, seen when she shares her lipstick withCJ.

characters.name: Benji and Enzo Froman
characters.description: Benji and Enzo FromanPhysical InformationGenderMaleHair colorRedAffiliationsOccupationStudentsSchoolPootatuck Middle SchoolProductionFirst seenLast seenPortrayed byStart a Garage Band Thing!Leave Your Mark Thing!BenjaminandMatthew RoyerBenji and Enzo Fromanare students atPootatuck Middle School. They are portrayed byBenjaminandMatthew Royer, respectively. They have a questioning nature and both have stage fright. They may be gullible, seeing as they believed the story of the janitor ghost. They seem to like searching for things, which is shown whenCrispotellsPaulhe is doing a scavenger hunt and they overhear, curious and excited just about the prospect of finding things. They also seem to follow what others doing such as trying to get their names on a plaque like Crispo. Season 1 They have a questioning nature and both have stage fright. characters.name: Blake Montgomery
characters.description: Blake MontgomeryPhysical InformationHair colorBlondeRelationshipsFamilyFatherAffiliationsOccupationStudent7th grade student government president(formerly)SchoolPootatuck Middle SchoolProductionFirst seenPortrayed byJoin a Club Thing!Jacob MeltonBlake Montgomeryis a student atPootatuck Middle School. He is portrayed byJacob Melton. CJsays that Blake's father owns nine boats, showing that his family is most likely wealthy. Blake is shown to be somewhat snobby. He appears to like the attention that being seventh grade president gave him, because once the attention was taken off of him, he became annoyed. He also showed a generous side to him when he gave CJ twenty-five of hisPootabucks. Blake is shown to be somewhat snobby. characters.name: Burt, Gert and Julio
characters.description: Burt, Gert and JulioBiographical InformationFull nameBurt, Gert and JulioOther namesFifth gradersPhysical InformationGenderMale (Burt and Julio)Female (Gert)AffiliationsSchoolPootatuck Elementary SchoolProductionFirst seenLast seenPortrayed byRaise Your Hand Thing!Raise Your Hand Thing!Devion Harris (Bert)Meyrick Murphy (Gert)Will Babbitt (Julio) Burt, Gert and Julioare the three fifth graders who go to Pootatuck Elementary School. Mr. RobertsentersCJ,FenwickandCrispo's class and asks for a volunteer to show fifth graders around the school, so CJ raises her hand. Mr. Roberts introduces her to Burt, Gert and Julio, who all seem polite at first. When Mr. Roberts leaves to allow CJ to show them around school, they run away from her.
characters.media_title: 100 Things to do Before High School

characters.name: Burt, Gert and Julio

characters.name: Christian Powers
characters.description: Christian PowersBiographical InformationFull nameChristian PowersNickname(s)CrispoOther namesSuper CapeAgent CheetahDate of birthc. 2003Age12 or 13Physical InformationGenderMaleEye colorBlueHair colorBlondeRelationshipsFamilyUnnamed fatherUnnamed motherStephen Powers(brother)Unnamed grandmotherRomancesSylvia Simmons(dated)CJ Martin(ex-crush; crush on her side)AffiliationsOccupationStudentSchoolPootatuck Middle SchoolProductionFirst seenPortrayed by100 Things to Do Before High SchoolOwen JoynerChristian "Crispo" Powersis the best friend ofCJandFenwickin the Nickelodeon TV series100 Things to Do Before High School. He is portrayed byOwen Joyner. Crispo has a father, mother, and an older brother named Stephen. It has been established that Crispo's family is not as well-off as CJ and Fenwick's. Both of his parents work, sometimes even late into the night. After a new haircut, a sweet jacket, and a newfound swag, Crispo quickly earns the title of coolest dude in school. But he will always be loyal to his two best friends and enthusiastic about any new challenge they will tackle together. Crispo is very fun-loving, carefree, friendly person who is willing to follow CJ into any trouble she gets into. He is generally the happiest out of the three. He takes risks without thinking of the consequences but his heart is in the right place. He can be argumentative, as seen in some of his conversations with Fenwick and Mindy. He has also shown selfish and lazy tendencies. He goes to lengths to right his wrongs, such as offering to plant more trees on Pootatuck's campus when he admits he burned down the Earth Day tree and returning the police bike he borrowed when the police thought it had been stolen.

characters.name: CJ Martin
characters.description: CJ MartinBiographical InformationFull nameCaroline June MartinNickname(s)CJCeejOther names•Totally Average Girl•Take Action Girl•Agent Jaguar•Baby sis (by Ronbie)•Angel Eyes (by Crispo)•Poodles (by Gorgeous Eighth Grade Boy)Date of birthc. 2003Age12 or 13Resides inMartin householdPhysical InformationGenderFemaleEye colorBrownHair colorBrownRelationshipsFamilyMr. Martin(father)Mrs. Martin(mother)Ronbie Martin(older brother)Nana (Paternal grandmother)Abuelita (Maternal grandmother)PetsBigsby (guinea pig)Lightning (fish; deceased)RomancesGorgeous Eighth Grade Boy(former crush)Crispo Powers(crush)AffiliationsOccupationStudentSchool MascotSchoolPootatuck Middle SchoolProductionFirst seenLast seenPortrayed by100 Things to Do Before High SchoolGet Your Heart Pre-Broken Thing!Isabela MercedCaroline June "CJ" Martinis the main protagonist of the series100 Things to Do Before High School. She is portrayed byIsabela Merced. CJ was born toMr. Martin, a podiatrist, andMrs. Martin, a real estate agent. She has an older brother namedRonbie. She has Spanish heritage on her mother's side. CJ is a 12-13 year old girl and nothing is more important to her than her best friends,FenwickandCrispo. That's why she's making the most of their friendship and turning every day into an adventure. CJ is very kind and optimistic girl. She believes there is good in everyone. She is never willing to give up on anything and is always taking chances on any opportunity that comes her way. CJ is shown to be persistent and determined in whatever endeavors she pursues, which has been noted by Mr. Roberts and Principal Hader. Her parents believe she is a master at persuasion. CJ does not mind presenting in front of large groups of people, shown when she sings in front of a crowd in "Start a Garage Band Thing!" and delivers a speech to the student body in "Run for Office Thing!" She is shown to be a good singer and is acknowledged as such by Mindy Minus. Mr. Roberts says that her super power is how she takes action in situations that others may freeze up in. CJ is the ringleader of her best friends and is the one that comes up with a new thing for them to do. She cares very deeply about her best friends and the thought of losing them scared her. There have been instances where CJ's other friends have shown they trust her.

CJ is a 12-13 year old girl and nothing is more important to her than her best friends,FenwickandCrispo. That's why she's making the most of their friendship and turning every day into an adventure. CJ is very kind and optimistic girl. She believes there is good in everyone. She is never willing to give up on anything and is always taking chances on any opportunity that comes her way. CJ is shown to be persistent and determined in whatever endeavors she pursues, which has been noted by Mr. Roberts and Principal Hader. Her parents believe she is a master at persuasion. CJ does not mind presenting in front of large groups of people, shown when she sings in front of a crowd in "Start a Garage Band Thing!" and delivers a speech to the student body in "Run for Office Thing!" She is shown to be a good singer and is acknowledged as such by Mindy Minus. Mr. Roberts says that her super power is how she takes action in situations that others may freeze up in. CJ is the ringleader of her best friends and is the one that comes up with a new thing for them to do. She cares very deeply about her best friends and the thought of losing them scared her. There have been instances where CJ's other friends have shown they trust her.
characters.personality_section: CJ is very kind and optimistic girl. She believes there is good in everyone. She is never willing to give up on anything and is always taking chances on any opportunity that comes her way. CJ is shown to be persistent and determined in whatever endeavors she pursues, which has been noted by Mr. Roberts and Principal Hader. Her parents believe she is a master at persuasion. CJ does not mind presenting in front of large groups of people, shown when she sings in front of a crowd in "Start a Garage Band Thing!" and delivers a speech to the student body in "Run for Office Thing!" She is shown to be a good singer and is acknowledged as such by Mindy Minus. Mr. Roberts says that her super power is how she takes action in situations that others may freeze up in. CJ is the ringleader of her best friends and is the one that comes up with a new thing for them to do. She cares very deeply about her best friends and the thought of losing them scared her. There have been instances where CJ's other friends have shown they trust her.

characters.name: Coach LeBeau
characters.description: Coach LeBeauBiographical InformationOther namesGym Coach LeBeauPhysical InformationGenderFemaleAffiliationsOccupationTeacherAffiliationsPootatuck Middle School(gym and sports coach)ProductionFirst seenPortrayed by100 Things to Do Before High SchoolDiane DelanoCoach LeBeauis currently a gym teacher and sports coach atPootatuck Middle School. She is portrayed by Diane Delano. Coach LeBeau can be loud, which is helpful in her profession. She can be rude to others, but she can be nice to get what she wants. She has also helpedFenwickboost his confidence in preparation for a wrestling match, which shows she can be caring. Coach LeBeau tells the students who did not have a signed release form for gym to wait on the bench while the others participated in class. Coach LeBeau can be loud, which is helpful in her profession. She can be rude to others, but she can be nice to get what she wants. She has also helpedFenwickboost his confidence in preparation for a wrestling match, which shows she can be caring.

He is portrayed by Nick Furu. Dale is a football player at Pootatuck and says he is the number one linebacker in the state. Dale is not very bright, but he has been shown being polite. He goofs around with his friends. He also has an emotional side. Dale is not very bright, but he has been shown being polite. He goofs around with his friends. He also has an emotional side.

characters.name: Dojo Dave
characters.description: Dojo DavePhysical InformationGenderMaleHair colorBrownAffiliationsOccupationKung fu instructorSchoolPootatuck Middle SchoolProductionFirst seenPortrayed byMaster a Thing Thing!Alex Hooper"Dojo Dave" is a Kung fu class instructor. His class is held in a community center. He is portrayed by Alex Hooper. Dojo Dave does not appear to be knowledgeable in the martial arts, as he cannot distinguish Kung fu characteristics from karate, nor does he care. He also does not seem to like being corrected. For the most part, he comes across as laid-back. Mr. MartingivesCJthe idea to try Kung fu when she is stumped on a thing to master. She finds out a class is taking place that night and she and her parents attend. Dojo Dave begins training the white belts, which are the beginners. He stops CJ, a white belt, from joining the orange belts, but gives her the steps to become an orange belt. He graces her with an orange belt after she completes the steps and when she joins the other orange belt wearers, he tells her she has to spar withGorgeous Eighth Grade Boy. Dojo Dave does not appear to be knowledgeable in the martial arts, as he cannot distinguish Kung fu characteristics from karate, nor does he care. He also does not seem to like being corrected. For the most part, he comes across as laid-back.
characters.personality_section: Dojo Dave does not appear to be knowledgeable in the martial arts, as he cannot distinguish Kung fu characteristics from karate, nor does he care. He also does not seem to like being corrected. For the most part, he comes across as laid-back.

characters.name: Dr. Martin
characters.description: Dr. MartinBiographical InformationFull nameDale Jason MartinOther namesMr. MartinAge38Resides inMartin householdPhysical InformationGenderMaleHair colorBrownRelationshipsFamilyMrs. Martin(wife)Ronbie Martin(son)CJ Martin(daughter)Unnamed motherUnnamed mother-in-lawRomancesBecky Sherwood (ex-crush)Kim McGraw (ex)AffiliationsOccupationPodiatristSchoolUnnamed collegeAffiliationsSPiT (band groupie)ProductionFirst seenPortrayed by100 Things to Do Before High SchoolHenry DittmanDr. Dale Martinis the father ofCJandRonbieand husband ofMrs. Martin. He‘s portrayed byHenry Dittman. In college, Dr. Martin decided to help with chemistry tutoring, which led to a scholarship opportunity. While doing chemistry tutoring, he met Mrs. Sunny Martin, who did not understand chemistry. Sometime later, the two got married and had a son and a daughter. Dr. Martin was a groupie for his wife's band SPiT, but it is unknown if they had met before or after the band had started. Ronbie says that Dr. Martin would attend every game and event he could make it to, which shows his love for his family. Ronbie describes Dr. Martin as providing the voice of calm when Mrs. Martin was agitated and also as being the "most-hugging dad in history." He also seems to scare easily, as seen with his reactions toAngelica, CJ's doll.

characters.name: Fenwick Frazier
characters.description: Fenwick FrazierBiographical InformationFull nameFenwick FrazierNickname(s)FenOther namesNose BoyAgent SquirrelDuke VanderbiltDate of birthc. 2003Age12 or 13Physical InformationGenderMaleEye colorBrownHair colorBlackRelationshipsFamilyUnnamed fatherUnnamed motherUnnamed godmotherFriendsCJ MartinCrispo PowersNatasha VillavovodovichArthur PickwickleBenji and Enzo FromanDale StubbsRomancesAmy Chu(asked out)EnemiesMindy MinusAffiliationsOccupationStudentSchoolPootatuck Middle SchoolProductionFirst seenLast seenPortrayed by100 Things to Do Before High SchoolGet Your Heart Pre-Broken Thing!Jaheem King ToombsFenwick Frazieris the best friend ofCJandCrispoin the Nickelodeon TV series100 Things to Do Before High School. He is portrayed byJaheem King Toombs. Fenwick has a father who works in robotics and a mother. Fenwick is the smartest kid in class, all brains. He’s the voice of reason in the group and tries to play by the rules because that’s what a future world leader does. Fenwick is a very smart, cautious, energetic guy, and at many times he is known to be the pessimistic one of the group. He doesn't always agree with CJ at times, but he is willing to help her on her adventures and is always the one who thinks of what bad can happen, which helps the group at times. He can also be very brave and fun-loving at times as seen in "Say Yes to Everything for a Day Thing!" when he stands up to Mindy and her friends and dances in the schools hallway with CJ. He has many fears that he documents in his fear book. Fenwick has shown selfish tendencies and can be rude and impatient with other people. He also wants to be the best at whatever endeavor he pursues and wants others to perceive him as being great. He is ashamed when he does not succeed at a task, like ceramics. He sometimes lies, which may tie back into him wanting to be perceived as great, and can be insensitive at times. He tries to get girls to notice him, but sometimes lies to them when they do. When he does not get his way or is disappointed by something not going according to plan, he is known to throw a tantrum, something that CJ calls him a master of doing. It is shown that he does not recall much after a has a tantrum.

characters.name: Fenwick's godmother
characters.description: Fenwick's godmotherBiographical InformationOther namesGodnana (by Fenwick)Physical InformationGenderFemaleHair colorGrayRelationshipsFamilyFenwick Frazier(godson)PetsWhiskers (cat)ProductionFirst seenPortrayed byBe a Fairy Godmother Thing!Lynda OdumsFenwick's godmotheris the godmother ofFenwick Frazier. She is portrayed by Lynda Odums. She is most likely very close to Fenwick's parents, which is indicated by the fact she was made their son's godmother. Fenwick says she cannot see very well. Fenwick's godmother would like to spend more time with him, so he grants her wish and visits her after school.

characters.name: Gorgeous Eighth Grade Boy
characters.description: Gorgeous Eighth Grade BoyPhysical InformationGenderMaleEye colorBrownHair colorBrownAffiliationsOccupationStudentSchoolPootatuck Middle SchoolProductionFirst seenPortrayed byRun with the Bears Thing!Chazz Nittolo"Gorgeous Eighth Grade Boy" isCJ Martin's crush. He is portrayed byChazz Nittolo. Gorgeous Eighth Grade Boy is an eighth grader atPootatuck Middle School. He has an interest in martial arts and attends a Kung fu class at his local community center. He skateboards and there is also a possibility that he likes photography. He appears to be polite, but can become annoyed when provoked. He has many friends, so he is most likely popular. He does not like to lose when he is in a competition or anything similar. When he loses in a spar against CJ, however, he was a good sport and remained amiable. He shows a goofy, playful side of himself when he is with his friends. He has a lot of confidence in himself. There are also times where he is inconsiderate. characters.name: Henry Slinko
characters.description: Henry SlinkoBiographical InformationFull nameHenry SlinkoOther namesSuper SlinkoPhysical InformationGenderMaleAffiliationsOccupationTeacherAffiliationsPootatuck Middle SchoolProductionFirst seenPortrayed by100 Things to Do Before High SchoolChristopher NeimanHenry Slinkois a science teacher atPootatuck Middle School. He is portrayed by Christopher Neiman. He does not like being humiliated, which is evident by his reaction to the raccoon ruining his experiments. He also has a sense of humor that others may not find funny. Slinko shows that he takes his job seriously and wants his students to understand the material and succeed. characters.name: Jack Roberts
characters.description: Jack RobertsBiographical InformationFull nameJack RobertsPhysical InformationGenderMaleEye colorBrownHair colorBrownRelationshipsFamilyUnnamed fatherUnnamed motherFriendsCJ MartinFenwick FrazierChristian PowersEnemiesPrincipal HaderAffiliationsOccupationGuidance counselorSchoolPootatuck Middle SchoolUnnamed collegeAffiliationsPootatuck Middle SchoolProductionFirst seenPortrayed by100 Things to Do Before High SchoolJack De SenaJack Robertsis a guidance counselor atPootatuck Middle School. He is portrayed byJack De Sena. If he is not out and about around the school helping students or teachers with something or partaking in an event, he is mainly seen inhis office. Jack said in "Say Yes to Everything for a Day Thing!" that he is a college educated guidance counselor. He is an authoritative guidance counselor - he is attentive and gives out sensible advice, but can be strict and hand out discipline when needed. He is also shown having faith in the students and encouraging them when they have doubts.

He is an authoritative guidance counselor - he is attentive and gives out sensible advice, but can be strict and hand out discipline when needed. He is also shown having faith in the students and encouraging them when they have doubts.

characters.name: Lightning Licano
characters.description: Lightning LicanoBiographical InformationNickname(s)Lightning LicanoPhysical InformationGenderMaleAffiliationsOccupationStudentSchoolPootatuck Middle SchoolProductionFirst seenPortrayed byMake a New Friend Thing!Phinehas YoonLightning Licanois a student atPootatuck Middle School. He is portrayed byPhinehas Yoon. Licano seems to not care about or abide by school rules, as he runs down the hallways whenever he wants. Licano is introduced in this episode. He runs down the halls and is chased byPaul, who can't catch him. Paul then enlistsCrispoto help him stop Licano. Paul and Crispo manage to stop Licano in his act of running, but Licano informs them he is faster than the scooters they used to catch up to him. While Paul and Crispo are distracted, he gets away. Licano seems to not care about or abide by school rules, as he runs down the hallways whenever he wants.

He is portrayed byGerdan Burton. Mark is shown to be scared of the janitor ghost story, so it is likely he does not like scary stories or is easily frightened. He is shown to be gassy. Mark has science class withCJ,Fenwick, andCrispo. During class, he passes gas and then tries to cover it up with a cough. Mark is shown to be scared of the janitor ghost story, so it is likely he does not like scary stories or is easily frightened. He is shown to be gassy.
